lastReleaseMessage: Course-refresh cron moved off GitHub Actions onto local Task Scheduler.

barRaise.topFinding: The biggest shipped-data risk is pin-position completeness on the canonical course library, not the remaining 1.0 launch-checklist items. docs/PIN_DATA_AUDIT-2026-05-25.md sampled 500 courses and flagged 499 of them: 63 NO_BASKET_ANY, 78 PARTIAL_BASKET, 358 SINGLE_PIN_ONLY, 1 ZERO_HOLES. audit_stale_courses.py reports 0 stale because it only checks lastScrapedAt, not actual data completeness. The recommender and the per-shot distance-to-pin chip read this data every round, so the user feels the gap directly on courses they play. docs/launch-checklist-1.0.md does not yet list pin-data quality as a 1.0 gate.
